description: Guard against false substance-use routing (guard-past-coping): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually depression territory. classify should recommend depression and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses substance-use-adjacent language but is actually depression territory. Should recommend depression path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I went through a really hard breakup last year and there were a few weeks where I was drinking too much to cope. I caught it and stopped. Now I'm dealing with the actual feelings underneath, and it's hard. I feel disconnected and sad most of the time.
